typical_resolution: Run speed test, check congestion, optimize router placement, escalate to network team if persistent

hi: Internet bahut slow chal raha hai
Speed bilkul nahi aa rahi plan wali
Bahut dhima hai net, kuch bhi load nahi hota
en: My internet speed is way below what I'm paying for
Speed test shows only 10Mbps on a 100Mbps plan
Everything is loading extremely slowly
hinglish: Yaar speed bahut slow hai, plan mein 100Mbps hai but 10 bhi nahi aa raha
Net ki speed ekdum down hai bhai
Mera internet itna slow hai ki YouTube bhi buffer karta hai

typical_resolution: Check area congestion, suggest off-peak usage, escalate capacity issue

hi: Shaam ko internet bahut slow ho jaata hai
Raat 8 baje ke baad speed gir jaati hai
Peak time mein kuch nahi chalta
en: Internet slows down terribly in the evening
Speed drops significantly after 8 PM
During peak hours the connection is unusable
hinglish: Evening mein speed ekdum drop ho jaati hai
Raat ko net bahut slow ho jaata hai yaar
Peak hours mein toh internet chalana mushkil hai

typical_resolution: Check ONT status, verify fiber link, restart router, check area outage, dispatch field team

hi: Internet bilkul nahi chal raha
Net band hai subah se
Koi connection hi nahi aa raha
en: My internet is completely down
No connection since this morning
There is no internet at all
hinglish: Bhai net toh bilkul band hai
Morning se internet nahi chal raha kuch bhi
Complete outage hai mere ghar pe

typical_resolution: Check signal levels, inspect fiber, replace splitter if needed, monitor for 24h

hi: Internet baar baar kat raha hai
Kabhi chalta hai kabhi nahi chalta
Net aata hai phir chala jaata hai
en: Internet keeps going on and off
Connection drops every few minutes
The internet is intermittent and unreliable
hinglish: Net baar baar disconnect ho raha hai bhai
Kabhi aata hai kabhi jaata hai, bahut frustrating
Har 10 minute mein internet cut ho jaata hai

typical_resolution: Check WiFi channel congestion, change channel, check interference, update firmware

hi: WiFi baar baar disconnect hota hai
Phone ka WiFi kat jaata hai baar baar
WiFi se device hat jaata hai khud se
en: WiFi keeps disconnecting from my devices
My phone drops WiFi connection frequently
Devices keep losing WiFi signal
hinglish: WiFi baar baar drop ho raha hai devices se
Mera phone WiFi se disconnect hota rehta hai
WiFi connection stable nahi rehta yaar

typical_resolution: Check router logs, verify power supply, replace router if faulty

hi: Router apne aap restart hota rehta hai
Router ki light baar baar off hoti hai
Modem khud se band ho jaata hai
en: The router keeps rebooting on its own
Router lights go off and come back repeatedly
My modem restarts by itself several times a day
hinglish: Router apne aap restart ho jaata hai din mein kai baar
Modem ki lights baar baar off ho jaati hain
Router khud se reboot hota rehta hai bhai

typical_resolution: Assess home layout, suggest mesh extender, reposition router, check antenna orientation

hi: Bedroom mein WiFi nahi aata
Ghar ke ek kamre mein signal nahi hai
Kitchen mein WiFi bilkul nahi milta
en: WiFi doesn't reach my bedroom
There's no signal in one room of my house
I have dead zones where WiFi doesn't work
hinglish: Bedroom mein WiFi signal nahi aata bhai
Mere ghar ke ek room mein bilkul WiFi nahi hai
Kitchen area mein toh WiFi dead zone hai

typical_resolution: Check router placement, reduce interference, adjust transmit power, recommend extender

hi: WiFi ka signal bahut kamzor hai
Ek baar ki signal strength bahut kam hai
Signal weak hai poore ghar mein
en: WiFi signal is very weak throughout my home
Signal strength is poor even near the router
I get only one bar of WiFi in most rooms
hinglish: WiFi signal bahut weak hai ghar mein
Signal strength bahut low show ho rahi hai
Router ke paas bhi signal achha nahi aata

typical_resolution: Check power adapter, verify wall outlet, replace adapter or router

hi: Router on hi nahi ho raha
Router ki koi light nahi jal rahi
Modem start nahi ho raha
en: My router is not turning on
No lights on the router at all
The router seems completely dead
hinglish: Router on nahi ho raha hai bhai
Koi bhi light nahi jal rahi router pe
Router dead ho gaya hai lagta hai

typical_resolution: Ensure proper ventilation, relocate router, replace if persistent overheating

hi: Router bahut garam ho raha hai
Modem chhune mein bahut garam lagta hai
Router overheat ho raha hai
en: The router is getting very hot
My modem is overheating constantly
Router surface is burning hot to touch
hinglish: Router bahut garam ho gaya hai touch karo toh haath jal jaaye
Modem overheat ho raha hai lagta hai
Router itna garam hai ki darr lagta hai

typical_resolution: Review billing history, identify discrepancy, issue credit or correct bill

hi: Bill galat aaya hai
Mujhse zyada paisa charge kiya gaya hai
Bill mein extra charge lagaya hai
en: I've been overcharged on my bill
My bill amount is incorrect
There are extra charges on my bill I don't recognize
hinglish: Bill mein extra charge lag gaya hai bhai
Mera bill galat hai, zyada paisa kata hai
Bill amount wrong show ho raha hai

typical_resolution: Verify payment gateway, check transaction status, reconcile with finance team

hi: Payment kiya lekin reflect nahi ho raha
Paisa kat gaya lekin bill paid nahi dikha raha
Recharge kiya hai lekin update nahi hua
en: I made a payment but it's not showing in my account
Payment was deducted but bill still shows unpaid
My recent payment hasn't been reflected
hinglish: Payment kar diya but reflect nahi ho raha account mein
Paisa toh kat gaya lekin bill paid nahi dikh raha
Recharge kiya tha but abhi tak update nahi hua

typical_resolution: Review service downtime records, calculate prorated refund, process through finance

hi: Internet nahi chala toh refund chahiye
Service nahi mili toh paisa wapas karo
Downtime ka refund do
en: I want a refund for the days internet was not working
Please refund me for the service outage period
I expect compensation for the downtime
hinglish: Internet nahi chala itne din toh refund toh banta hai
Downtime ka compensation chahiye mujhe
Service nahi mili toh paisa wapas karo bhai

typical_resolution: Check installation queue, coordinate with field team, provide ETA

hi: Installation abhi tak nahi hua
Connection ke liye apply kiya tha lekin koi aaya nahi
Kabse wait kar rahe hain installation ka
en: My installation is still pending after a week
No one has come for the connection setup
When will my JioFiber installation be done
hinglish: Installation ka koi update nahi hai bhai
Apply kiya tha connection ke liye lekin koi nahi aaya abhi tak
Ek hafta ho gaya installation pending hai

typical_resolution: Escalate to installation supervisor, provide priority scheduling, compensate for delay

hi: Teen baar reschedule ho chuka hai installation
Har baar naya date de dete hain
Installation baar baar postpone ho raha hai
en: Installation has been rescheduled three times already
They keep pushing the installation date
Every time I get a new date but no one shows up
hinglish: Installation teen baar reschedule ho chuka hai ab toh had hai
Baar baar date change kar rahe hain bhai
Har baar naya date dete hain lekin koi aata nahi

typical_resolution: Verify provisioning status, activate OLT port, sync ONT, test connection

hi: Installation ho gaya lekin net shuru nahi hua
Connection laga diya lekin activate nahi hai
Router laga hai lekin internet nahi aa raha
en: Installation is done but internet is not activated
My connection was set up but service hasn't started
Router is installed but I can't connect to internet
hinglish: Installation toh ho gaya but net activate nahi hua
Connection lag gaya hai lekin internet nahi aa raha
Router toh hai but service start nahi hui

typical_resolution: Explain available plans, process upgrade, update provisioning, verify new speed

hi: Plan upgrade karna hai
Zyada speed wala plan chahiye
Mera plan change karna hai better wala
en: I want to upgrade to a faster plan
Can I switch to a higher speed plan
What are my upgrade options
hinglish: Plan upgrade karna hai bhai zyada speed chahiye
Koi better plan hai kya faster wala
Mera plan change karo higher speed mein

typical_resolution: Understand reason, offer retention deal, process downgrade if insisted, update provisioning

hi: Plan chhota karna hai
Sasta plan chahiye
Itna speed nahi chahiye, plan kam karo
en: I want to downgrade my plan
Can I switch to a cheaper plan
I don't need this much speed, reduce my plan
hinglish: Plan downgrade karna hai bhai, itna speed nahi chahiye
Koi sasta plan hai kya switch karna hai
Plan kam karo yaar budget tight hai

typical_resolution: Understand reason, offer retention deal, process cancellation if insisted, arrange equipment pickup

hi: Connection cancel karna hai
Service band karna hai
Jio Fiber nahi chahiye ab
en: I want to cancel my JioFiber connection
Please disconnect my service
I want to terminate my broadband
hinglish: Connection cancel karna hai bhai
Service band karo yaar bahut problems hain
Jio Fiber nahi chahiye ab disconnect karo

typical_resolution: Check speed, test streaming server connectivity, clear DNS cache, suggest wired connection

hi: Netflix bahut buffer karta hai
Video streaming mein bahut buffering hoti hai
Hotstar pe kuch dekhna mushkil hai buffering ki wajah se
en: Netflix keeps buffering even though I have a fast plan
Video streaming is constantly interrupted
Can't watch anything without buffering issues
hinglish: Netflix pe bahut buffering hoti hai yaar
Streaming karte time video ruk ruk ke chalta hai
Hotstar pe match dekhna impossible hai buffering ki wajah se

typical_resolution: Check ping to gaming servers, optimize QoS settings, suggest wired connection, check for packet loss

hi: Game mein bahut lag aa raha hai
Ping bahut high hai gaming mein
Online game khelna mushkil hai lag ki wajah se
en: I'm experiencing high ping while gaming
Latency is terrible for online games
Game lag is making it impossible to play
hinglish: Gaming mein bahut lag aa raha hai bhai ping 200+ hai
PUBG khelne mein bahut latency aa rahi hai
Online games mein ping bahut high hai fix karo

typical_resolution: Flush DNS cache, change to public DNS, verify DNS resolution, check for ISP-level blocks

hi: Kuch websites nahi khul rahi
Google toh chalta hai lekin baaki sites nahi
Website open nahi ho rahi hai
en: Some websites are not loading
Google works but other sites don't open
I can't access certain websites
hinglish: Kuch websites open nahi ho rahi bhai
Google chal raha hai but baaki sites nahi khul rahi
Specific websites load nahi ho rahi internet hone ke baad bhi

typical_resolution: Check device WiFi settings, forget and reconnect, verify MAC filtering, check DHCP pool

hi: Naya phone WiFi se connect nahi ho raha
Laptop WiFi se nahi jud raha
Smart TV mein internet nahi aa raha
en: My new phone can't connect to WiFi
Laptop won't connect to the network
Smart TV is not getting internet
hinglish: Naya phone WiFi se connect nahi ho raha hai bhai
Laptop WiFi se nahi jud raha troubleshoot karo
Smart TV pe internet nahi aa raha hai

typical_resolution: Check connected device count, remove unused devices, suggest plan upgrade for more devices

hi: Bahut saare devices hain toh speed kam ho gayi
Kitne devices connect kar sakte hain
Naya device connect karne pe purane disconnect ho jaate hain
en: Too many devices are slowing down my internet
How many devices can I connect at once
New devices kick off old ones from the network
hinglish: Bahut saare devices connect hain toh speed slow ho gayi hai
Kitne devices support karta hai mera plan
Jab naya device connect karta hoon toh purane hat jaate hain

typical_resolution: Guide to check router admin panel, reset WiFi password via app or router interface

hi: WiFi ka password bhool gaya
Password kya hai WiFi ka
WiFi password change karna hai
en: I forgot my WiFi password
What is my WiFi password
I need to reset my WiFi password
hinglish: WiFi password bhool gaya hai bhai kaise pata karu
WiFi ka password kya tha yaad nahi aa raha
Password reset karna hai WiFi ka

typical_resolution: Check data usage, explain FUP policy, suggest plan upgrade, add data booster

hi: Data khatam ho gaya hai
Speed bahut slow ho gayi hai data khatam hone ke baad
FUP limit lag gayi hai
en: My data limit has been reached
Speed reduced after data exhaustion
I've hit my FUP limit
hinglish: Data khatam ho gaya hai speed ekdum slow ho gayi
FUP limit lag gayi hai bhai kuch karo
Monthly data exhaust ho gaya hai speed gir gayi

typical_resolution: Dispatch field technician, repair or replace fiber cable, test signal levels

hi: Fiber cable kat gayi hai
Wire toot gayi hai bahar
Cable damage ho gayi hai construction mein
en: The fiber cable has been cut outside my home
Construction work damaged my fiber cable
The wire is broken near the junction box
hinglish: Fiber cable kat gayi hai bhai bahar construction chal raha tha
Wire toot gayi hai kisi ne kaat di lagta hai
Cable damage ho gayi hai isliye net nahi aa raha

typical_resolution: Check fiber connection to ONT, inspect fiber bend, clean fiber connector, replace ONT if faulty

hi: Router pe red light aa rahi hai
ONT pe lal batti jal rahi hai
Modem pe LOS ki red light hai
en: There's a red light on my ONT device
The LOS indicator is showing red
Red light is blinking on the modem
hinglish: Router pe red light aa rahi hai bhai kya karu
ONT pe lal light jal rahi hai LOS wali
Modem pe red light blink ho rahi hai

typical_resolution: Check port blocking, suggest protocol change, verify ISP-level restrictions, recommend alternative VPN settings

hi: VPN nahi chal raha hai
Office ka VPN connect nahi ho raha
VPN se kaam nahi ho pa raha
en: My VPN is not working on JioFiber
Can't connect to office VPN
VPN keeps disconnecting
hinglish: VPN connect nahi ho raha hai office wala
Jio pe VPN nahi chalta kya bhai
Work from home ke liye VPN chahiye but connect nahi hota

typical_resolution: Check connected devices list, change WiFi password, enable MAC filtering, set up guest network

hi: Koi aur mera WiFi use kar raha hai
Unknown device connected dikh raha hai
WiFi chori ho raha hai
en: Someone else is using my WiFi
I see unknown devices on my network
My WiFi might be hacked
hinglish: Koi aur mera WiFi use kar raha hai lagta hai
Unknown devices dikh rahe hain network pe
WiFi hack ho gaya hai kya koi aur bhi connect hai
